title: LA SFR — Type V-B single-family, complete code analysis
notes: Clean baseline. Code-analysis sheet has all required fields; no overlay zones flagged. Stair geometry (tread 10 in, riser 7-3/4 in, guard 42 in) is at the CRC R318.5 / R312.1.2 limits — clean true negative for the CRC geometry rules.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 1234 MAPLE ST, LOS ANGELES CA 90026
CODE ANALYSIS SHEET A-0.1
2023 LA BUILDING CODE (LABC) - based on 2022 CBC with LA amendments
Occupancy Group: R-3 (single-family dwelling)
Construction Type: V-B
Number of stories: 2
Building height: 24 ft
Total building area: 2,800 sf
Per-story area: 1,400 sf
Fully sprinklered: yes (NFPA 13D residential)
Design occupant load: 10
IECC compliance path: Title 24 Part 6 prescriptive
Electrical service: 200 A service main breaker
Water closets: WC 3
Lavatories: LAV 3
EXIT 1 (front door)
EXIT 2 (rear door)
EXIT DOOR 36" min clear width
Fire alarm: NFPA 72 smoke alarms per CRC R314
No commercial kitchen. No atrium. No elevator.

ground_truth.rationale: A lone R-3 single-family dwelling is a single occupancy — IBC 508 mixed-occupancy separation/analysis does not apply, so this check is not-applicable rather than an affirmative pass
R-3 dwellings use CRC R310 smoke alarms, not an NFPA 72 fire-alarm SYSTEM (scored by CRC-SMOKE-CO); FLS-ALARM is gated off for R-3, so not-applicable is correct
Tread depth 10 in meets the CRC R318.5 minimum — clean true negative for the R-3 tread rule
Riser height 7.75 in is within the CRC R318.5 7-3/4 in maximum — clean true negative for the R-3 riser max check
Guard height 42 in meets the CRC R312.1.2 minimum — clean true negative for the R-3 guard rule
